summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sus10 AI platform after main agent fixes. All requested features working perfectly with 100% backend API success and excellent frontend functionality including proper data loading and navigation.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section, navigation, search input, and stats display
Building search page displays all 8 buildings in cards with proper data (DLF Cyber City, Infosys Campus, etc.)
Building cards show AQI indicators, verification badges, terrace areas, and data quality scores
Click on building card successfully navigates to building detail page
Building detail page shows all 4 tabs: Overview, Solutions, Explainability, Providers
Building detail displays complete information (5,000 sqm footprint, 3,500 sqm terrace, AQI 156, 75.5% green potential)
Providers page lists GreenScape Solutions with 4.7 rating, certifications, and service areas
Initiatives page shows Green Gurugram 2025 with ₹12.5L/₹50L funding progress and community stats
Dark/light mode toggle functionality works (visual theme switching confirmed)
Navigation between all pages (Buildings, Providers, Initiatives) works seamlessly
All backend APIs (23 endpoints) returning 200 status with proper data
Search filters and buttons are clickable and responsive
Professional UI design with proper spacing, colors, and visual hierarchy

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly, navigation works, data displays properly
